case_title: ANTHONY WILSON BELMONTE VS. ALBERTO ALABANZA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALABANZA, ALBERTO AKA ALBERTO MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET INIT #736 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,983.15 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,983.15, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC. DEFT. AGREED TO AND WAIVES RIGHT TO SEEK FURTHER STAYS OF EVICTION. NOTE, THIS IS NOT A AMENDED JUDGMENT, ONLY A LJUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION.
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-23-2002 VACATED. CASE SETTLED.
